gateResults.G8_Environment: WARN (B2C-SHIP-015/016 features not present on /account/addresses in current theme build; only checkout popup has facets/search)

suspectedFindings.description: PR #129 advanced search + country/state/city facets are NOT visible in /account/addresses listing OR header ship-to popover — only in checkout address-selection popup (covered by prior run CHK-087..106). Could be intentional scope or future deliverable. Needs PM clarification before filing as bug.
suspectedFindings.impact: B2C-SHIP-015 and B2C-SHIP-016 describe aspirational behavior — set Automation_Status:blocked-by-frontend-scope or remove pending decision

suspectedFindings.description: Personal user has junk-data default address (unicode mash, 8-digit ZIP). Test data pollution, not a code defect. UX gap: no client-side input validation.

blockers.description: playwright-firefox MCP fails to launch (Juggler pipe timeout). Fell back to Chrome.
blockers.resolution: Run npx playwright install firefox OR investigate MCP config

blockers.description: playwright-edge profile gets locked after first session; browser_close does not release it
blockers.resolution: Use --isolated flag on Edge MCP config, OR prefer Chrome for single-agent runs

new.title: Silent duplicate-skip on updateMemberAddresses
new.rule: When updateMemberAddresses is called with an address identical to an already-saved address (matched by line1 + city + countryCode + postalCode + regionId + addressType), the duplicate is silently skipped — no new record, no error, totalCount unchanged.

manualDecisionsRequired: F1: PM confirmation of PR #129 scope — is advanced search intended for /account/addresses and ship-to header, or checkout popup only? Affects B2C-SHIP-015/016 status.
